# LocalizeShots

> App Store Screenshot Generator & ASO Tool

## What is LocalizeShots?

LocalizeShots is a web-based tool that helps app developers create professional, localized App Store screenshots. It combines AI-powered headline generation with device mockups and one-click translation to 40+ languages.

## Key Features

- AI-powered headline generation for App Store screenshots
- iPhone and iPad device mockups (iPhone 16, 15 Pro, iPad Pro)
- One-click translation to 40+ languages
- ASO metadata generation (app name, subtitle, keywords, description)
- AI-generated app icons (DALL-E 3)
- ZIP export organized by language
- Visual editor with drag-and-drop

## Pricing

- Free Plan: 3 projects, 2 languages, all mockup styles
- Pro Monthly: $9.99/month - unlimited projects, 40+ languages, ASO metadata
- Pro Yearly: $59.99/year - same as Pro Monthly, billed annually

## Target Audience

- iOS and Android app developers
- App Store Optimization (ASO) specialists
- Mobile app marketing teams
- Indie developers and studios
